title: Zambian Beef Pilaf
description: A hearty and flavorful Zambian-inspired dish made with beef, pilaf, and a hint of citrus.

ingredients.name: Citrusy Marinade
ingredients.notes: mix of orange and lemon juice

instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add onions and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add pilaf and cook for 2 minutes.
Stir in citrusy marinade and fix spice blend.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 10-15 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
